title: Match footer background color to header background color

requirements.summary: Update the Footer component's background color to exactly match the LandingHeader component's background color for visual consistency
acceptanceCriteria: The footer background color is visually identical to the header background color.
The footer's existing content (logo, links, copyright, attribution) remains fully visible and readable against the new background.
No other footer styles (padding, spacing, font sizes) are changed.

file_operations.description: Update the Footer component's background color className to match the LandingHeader component's background. Review the LandingHeader component to identify its exact background color class, then apply the same background color class to the Footer's root element while preserving all other existing styles, content structure, and spacing.
